title: schoenoplectus × oblongus
intro: Schoenoplectus × oblongus is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the cattail family (Typhaceae), resulting from a cross between Schoenoplectus tabernaemontani and Schoenoplectus californicus. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Schoenoplectus × oblongus include its potential to support digestive health, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
